title: lithocarpus annamitorus
intro: Lithocarpus annamitorus, also known as the Vietnamese stone oak, is a plant species in the beech family (Fagaceae) that is native to Vietnam and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus annamitorus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In traditional herbal medicine, Lithocarpus annamitorus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and bark are used to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal preparations.
